arts.ttl: Thomas Partey one step closer to Arsenal exit as midfielder's preference revealed
arts.sum: The Ghanaian international was one of the biggest transfers of the summer 2020 window after arriving from Atletico Madrid, but has not yet penned a new contract in London and has reportedly set his sights on life back in Spain. Barcelona have been identified as the midfielder's favourite suitors and with their currently dire financial situation, bringing the 31-year-old in on a free contract offers an easy way to bolster their squad without splashing the cash.

arts.ttl: Arsenal hosts Real Madrid in 'biggest night' of Arteta's career
arts.sum: The Gunners face Madrid again in the first leg of the quarterfinals at their Emirates Stadium home on Tuesday, and manager Mikel Arteta has already called it “the biggest night of my career.” That was also the last time Arsenal came close to winning the competition, losing the 2006 final to Barcelona after beating Madrid in the round of 16.

arts.ttl: Lazio can spin significant profit on Arsenal loanee Nuno Tavares – report
arts.sum: Tuesday’s reports claim that Lazio could look to spin an immediate profit on Arsenal loanee...

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Real Madrid cannot wear their iconic white kit against Arsenal in the Champions League - despite regularly sporting it during away legs in Europe this season
arts.sum: Real Madrid will not be allowed to wear their famous all-white strip when they take on Arsenal in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Nathan Patterson set Everton challenge as former Rangers star talks up unorthodox Arsenal role
arts.sum: Patterson put in a shift in an unfamiliar left back role as the Toffees held Arsenal to a 1-1 draw at Goodison Park on Saturday.
Where to watch, predicted line-ups, team news for the quarter-final first leg.

arts.ttl: 'Upset their defence': Martin Keown says £6m Arsenal player could really trouble Real Madrid tonight
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to contest the most important game of their season so far as they host Real Madrid in their Champions League quarter-final first...

arts.ttl: Declan Rice and two other Arsenal players facing Champions League suspension for Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Arsenal could be without three key stars due to UEFA's suspension rules for their Champions League quarter-final second leg against Real Madrid. Only Calafiori is expected to play again this season out of those five and he could even be back for the second leg.

arts.ttl: Antonio Rudiger drops early Real Madrid team news hint as Arsenal sent Champions League warning
arts.sum: Antonio Rudiger has dropped a team news hint ahead of Real Madrid's clash against Arsenal. The Gunners will lock horns with Los Blancos at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night for the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie.

arts.ttl: Arsenal signal interest in RB Leipzig’s Amadou Haidara
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly again interested in picking up Malian international Amadou Haidara from RB Leipzig.
